candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component only, not the total.
Balancing line, not a clean reported total.
Wrong section of assets.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Alternate cash label, but appears less complete/clean than the main line.
Cash-related line, but narrower/alternate wording versus the direct cash-equivalents total.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance, not preferred when balance sheet cash exists.

variables.notes: Priority list reflects apparent label variation over time; preferred balance-sheet cash line first.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not a clean reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct balance-sheet label for current portion of interest-bearing debt; excludes lease wording.
Valid alternate/current maturities label for short-term debt when the main short-term portion label is absent.

variables.notes: Used a priority list of non-lease short-term debt labels. Do not combine with lease lines such as 'Leasing Liabilities' or 'Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year'.
No clear taxes payable/current tax liability label appears on the provided Balance Sheet preview.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for property, plant and equipment; reported as net tangible fixed assets.
Explicit PPE label, but gross amount is less preferred than total/net PPE when available.
Balancing line, not a clean reported PPE amount.

variables.notes: Preferred the net/total tangible fixed assets line. Included the explicit gross PPE label as secondary priority for label variation.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Assets - Total/Unspecified - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Not total assets; unrelated balancing line.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow pre-working-capital, not the final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the desired final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net cash flow from operating activities line from the cash flow statement.
